name: Rotini and Crab
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to package instructions.
2. Add broccoli 5 minutes before the pasta is done cooking.
3. Continue cooking until all ingredients are hot and broccoli is tender (about 5 more minutes).
4. Drain and rinse the pasta under cold water; set aside.
5. Heat margarine and olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
6. Add garlic, zucchini, and scallions; cook for 2 to 3 minutes until vegetables are just softened.
7. Stir in crab meat; cook for an additional minute.
8. Add the cooked pasta and broccoli to the skillet; toss gently to combine.
9. Sprinkle with salt, pepper, and remaining grated Parmesan cheese.
10. Serve immediately.
Makes 8 servings.
This dish is delicious hot as a main course or cold as a salad. Leftovers are perfect for lunches.
Weight Watchers exchanges: 1 1/2 bread, 1 1/2 protein, 1 1/2 vegetable, 1 fat and 30 optional calories.
